stages.concept:
# Unit 097: 부정 의문문 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **부정 의문문**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> **Don't** you like pizza?
> 너는 피자를 좋아하지 않니?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 부정 의문문은 **부정어(n't)로 시작하는 의문문**이에요. 확인, 놀람, 동의 구하기 등에 쓰여요.

> **Isn't** she beautiful?
> 그녀는 아름답지 않니?

> **Can't** you come to the party?
> 파티에 올 수 없니?

> **Didn't** you hear the news?
> 그 소식을 듣지 못했니?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 대답할 때 주의! **사실 그대로** 대답해요.

> **Don't** you like pizza? (피자 좋아하지 않니?)
> — **Yes**, I do. (아니, 좋아해.) ← 좋아하면 Yes
> — **No**, I don't. (응, 안 좋아해.) ← 안 좋아하면 No

👩‍🏫 선생님: 한국어와 **반대**예요! 영어는 **사실이 긍정이면 Yes, 부정이면 No**!

> **Isn't** he a student? (그는 학생이 아닌가요?)
> — **Yes**, he is. (아니요, 학생입니다.) ← 학생이면 Yes
> — **No**, he isn't. (네, 학생이 아닙니다.) ← 학생 아니면 No

**Q. "Don't you like apples?" (사과 안 좋아하니?) 라는 질문에, 스스로 사과를 좋아하는 상황일 때 올바른 대답을 고르세요.**
1. Yes, I don't.
2. No, I do.
3. Yes, I do. ✅

🧑‍🎓 학생: 부정 의문문 대답은 질문이 긍정이든 부정이든 상관없이, 사실관계가 긍정이면 Yes(좋아한다), 부정이면 No(안 좋아한다) 이군요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 097: 부정 의문문 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 주어진 동사를 이용하여 부정의문문을 완성하시오.
(현재시제)
너는 영어를 좋아하지 않니? (like)
(     ) English?
> **정답** Don't you like

---

**02.** 그녀는 학생이 아니니? (be)
(     ) a student?
> **정답** Isn't she

---

**03.** 그들은 축구를 하지 않니? (play)
(     ) soccer?
> **정답** Don't they play

---

**04.** 그는 수영을 할 수 없니? (can, swim)
(     ) (     )
> **정답** Can't he swim

---

**05.** 어제 비가 오지 않았니? (rain)
(     ) yesterday?
> **정답** Didn't it rain

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Do not you like music?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Do not you → Don't you

---

**07.** Is not she beautiful?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Is not she → Isn't she

---

**08.** Did not he come yesterday?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Did not he → Didn't he

---

**09.** Can not you swim?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Can not you → Can't you

---

**10.** Were not they happy?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Were not they → Weren't they

---

**11.** 부정 의문문에 알맞은 대답을 고르시오.
Don't you like pizza?
(네, 좋아해요)
> **정답** Yes, I do.

---

**12.** Isn't she your sister?
(아니요, 제 언니가 아니에요)
> **정답** No, she isn't.

---

**13.** Didn't he go to school?
(네, 갔어요)
> **정답** Yes, he did.

---

**14.** Can't you drive?
(아니요, 못 해요)
> **정답** No, I can't.

---

**15.** Wasn't the movie fun?
(네, 재미있었어요)
> **정답** Yes, it was.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
너는 배고프지 않니?
Aren't hungry you
> **정답** Aren't / you / hungry

---

**17.** 그녀는 예쁘지 않니?
Isn't pretty she
> **정답** Isn't / she / pretty

---

**18.** 그들은 오지 않았니?
Didn't come they
> **정답** Didn't / they / come

---

**19.** 이것은 네 것이 아니니?
Isn't yours this
> **정답** Isn't / this / yours

---

**20.** 너는 수영을 못 하니?
Can't swim you
> **정답** Can't / you / swim
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 097: 부정 의문문 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 부정 의문문이 되도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
_______ Tom enjoy Reading a book?
Isn't
Doesn't
Is
Don't
> **정답** Doesn't

---

**02.** 부정 의문문이 되도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
_______ they playing soccer together?
Didn't
Wasn't
Aren't
Did
> **정답** Aren't

---

**03.** 부정 의문문이 되도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두
고르시오.
_______ you finish this work?
Doesn't
Didn't
Aren't
Can't
> **정답** Can't, Didn't

---

**04.** 주어진 대화에서 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Aren't you going to eat dinner?
B: No, _____ _______.
You aren't
You are
I am
I'm not
> **정답** I'm not

---

**05.** 주어진 대화에서 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Aren't these books yours?
B: No, _____ _______.
it is
they aren't
they are
they don't
> **정답** they aren't

---

**06.** 주어진 대화에서 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Doesn't she speak French?
B: Yes, _____ _______.
she isn't
she doesn't
she is
she does
> **정답** she does

---

**07.** 다음 대화에서 주어진 상황에 맞게 알맞은 대답을
고르시오.
A: Didn't Amy go to the department store yesterday?
B: ________________________.
-(Amy didn't go to the department store yesterday.)
Yes, she didn't
Yes, she did
No, she didn't
No, she did
> **정답** No, she didn't

---

**08.** 다음 대화에서 주어진 상황에 맞게 알맞은 대답을
고르시오.
A: Will they have an election tomorrow?
B: ________________________.
-(They will have an election tomorrow.)
No, they won't
Yes, they won't
Yes, they will
No, they will
• election 선거
> **정답** Yes, they will

---

**09.** 다음 대화에서 주어진 상황에 맞게 알맞은 대답을
고르시오.
A: Doesn't he take a walk with her?
B: ________________________.
-(He takes a walk with her.)
No, he doesn't
Yes, he does
No, he does
Yes, he doesn't
> **정답** Yes, he does

---

**10.** 다음 대화 중 자연스럽지 않은 것을 고르시오.
A: Won't you go shopping tomorrow?
B: No, I don't.
A: Don't you use the dictionary?
B: No, I don't.
A: Isn't she wearing blue pants?
B: Yes, she is.
A: Didn't they watch the movie?
B: Yes, they did.
> **정답** A: Won't you go shopping tomorrow? B: No, I don't.

---

**11.** 다음 대화 중 자연스럽지 않은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
A: Doesn't she have curly hair?
B: No, she does.
A: Will he give her a letter?
B: Yes, he will.
A: Can't they skateboard?
B: Yes, they can't.
A: Doesn't she have a cat?
B: No, she doesn't
> **정답** A: Doesn't she have curly hair? B: No, she does., A:
Can't they skateboard? B: Yes, they can't.

---

**12.** 다음 질문의 대답으로 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Isn't she your music teacher?
No, she is.
No, she isn't.
Yes, she isn't.
Yes, she is.
> **정답** Yes, she is., No, she isn't.

---

**13.** 다음 질문의 대답으로 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Didn't she order pizza for lunch?
No, she did.
No, she didn't.
Yes, she didn't.
Yes, she did.
> **정답** Yes, she did., No, she didn't.

---

**14.** 다음 질문의 대답으로 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Weren't you at home when in the evening?
Yes, I was.
Yes, I wasn't.
No, I was.
No, I wasn't.
> **정답** No, I wasn't., Yes, I was.

---

**15.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 이 문제를 풀 수 없니?
Didn't she solve this problem?
Can she solves this problem?
Can't she solve this problem?
She can't solve this problem?
> **정답** Can't she solve this problem?

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그가 이 가방을 사지 않았니?
Didn't he bought this bag?
Did he buy this bag?
He didn't buy this bag?
Didn't he buy this bag?
> **정답** Didn't he buy this bag?

---

**17.** 주어진 문장을 부정의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을
고르시오.
They did volunteer work on Friday.
Did they do volunteer work on Friday?
Aren't they do volunteer work on Friday?
Didn't they do volunteer work on Friday?
They didn't volunteer work on Friday?
> **정답** Didn't they do volunteer work on Friday?

---

**18.** 다음 문장을 부정 의문으로 바꿀때 틀린 부분을 바르게
고치시오.
He is a doctor.
→ Doesn't he a doctor?
> **정답** Isn't

---

**19.** 다음 문장을 부정 의문으로 바꿀때 틀린 부분을 바르게
고치시오.
You will play the piano in the afternoon.
→ Don't you play the piano in the afternoon?
> **정답** Won't

---

**20.** 다음 문장을 부정 의문으로 바꿀때 틀린 부분을 바르게
고치시오.
Your dad built this house last year.
→ Doesn't your dad build this house last year?
> **정답** Didn't
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 097 부정 의문문중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 부정의문문으로 바꾸어 쓰시오.
This house has a garden.
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 Doesn't, this, house, have, a, garden

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 부정의문문으로 바꾸어 쓰시오.
Your mother taught English.
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 Didn't, your, mother, teach, English

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 부정의문문으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
You are writing a report.
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 Aren't, you, writing, a, report

---

**04.** 다음 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 넣어 대화를 완성하시오.
A: Doesn't she have two younger brothers?
해설:  그녀에게는 남동생이 두 명 있지 않나요?
B:  (     ) ,  (     )   (     ) .
해설:  네, 있어요.
정답 Yes, she, does

---

**05.** 다음 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 넣어 대화를 완성하시오.
A: Won't you be free on Sunday?
해설:  당신은 일요일에 시간이 안 되나요?
B:  (     ) ,  (     )   (     ) .
해설: 아니, 시간이 없어.
정답 No, I, won't

---

**06.** 다음 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 넣어 대화를 완성하시오.
A: Didn't they eat ramen for lunch?
해설:  그들은 점심으로 라면을 먹지 않았나요?
B:  (     ) ,  (     )   (     ) .
해설:  네, 먹었어요.
정답 Yes, they, did

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 고양이를 좋아하지 않니?
힌트 (     ) like cats
  (     )   (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 Doesn't, he, like, cats

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Jessica는 미국인이 아니니?
힌트 (     ) be, American
  (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 Isn't, Jessica, American

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
너희는 교실 청소를 하지 않았니?
힌트 (     ) clean the classroom
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 Didn't, you, clean, the, classroom

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀는 이 차를 팔지 않나요?
힌트 (     ) sell this car
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 Doesn't, she, sell, this, car

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 097: 부정 의문문 - 변형문제

**01.** 부정 의문문이 되도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ Amy enjoy playing the piano?
Isn't Doesn't Is Don't
> 정답: Doesn't

---

**02.** 부정 의문문이 되도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ they playing basketball together?
Didn't Wasn't Aren't Did
> 정답: Aren't

---

**03.** 부정 의문문이 되도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오.
_______ you finish this project?
Doesn't Didn't Aren't Can't
> 정답: Can't, Didn't

---

**04.** 주어진 대화에서 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Aren't you going to eat lunch?
B: No, _____ _______.
You aren't You are I am I'm not
> 정답: I'm not

---

**05.** 주어진 대화에서 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Aren't these pencils yours?
B: No, _____ _______. it is they aren't they are they don't
> 정답: they aren't

---

**06.** 주어진 대화에서 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Doesn't she speak Spanish?
B: Yes, _____ _______. she isn't she doesn't she is she does
> 정답: she does

---

**07.** 다음 대화에서 주어진 상황에 맞게 알맞은 대답을 고르시오.
A: Didn't Tom go to the bookstore yesterday?
B: ________________________.
-(Tom didn't go to the bookstore yesterday.) Yes, he didn't Yes, he did No, he didn't No, he did
> 정답: No, he didn't

---

**08.** 다음 대화에서 주어진 상황에 맞게 알맞은 대답을 고르시오.
A: Will they have a meeting tomorrow?
B: ________________________.
-(They will have a meeting tomorrow.) No, they won't Yes, they won't Yes, they will No, they will
> 정답: Yes, they will

---

**09.** 다음 대화에서 주어진 상황에 맞게 알맞은 대답을 고르시오.
A: Doesn't he take a walk with her?
B: ________________________.
-(He takes a walk with her.) No, he doesn't Yes, he does No, he does Yes, he doesn't
> 정답: Yes, he does

---

**10.** 다음 대화 중 자연스럽지 않은 것을 고르시오.
A: Won't you go hiking tomorrow?
B: No, I don't.
A: Don't you use the laptop?
B: No, I don't.
A: Isn't she wearing a red jacket?
B: Yes, she is.
A: Didn't they watch the show?
B: Yes, they did.
> 정답: A: Won't you go hiking tomorrow? B: No, I don't.

---

**11.** 다음 대화 중 자연스럽지 않은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
A: Doesn't she have short hair?
B: No, she does.
A: Will he give her a gift?
B: Yes, he will.
A: Can't they roller skate?
B: Yes, they can't.
A: Doesn't she have a dog?
B: No, she doesn't
> 정답: A: Doesn't she have short hair? B: No, she does., A:

---

**12.** 다음 질문의 대답으로 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Isn't she your art teacher?
No, she is.
No, she isn't.
Yes, she isn't.
Yes, she is.
> 정답: Yes, she is., No, she isn't.

---

**13.** 다음 질문의 대답으로 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Didn't she order a salad for lunch?
No, she did.
No, she didn't.
Yes, she didn't.
Yes, she did.
> 정답: Yes, she did., No, she didn't.

---

**14.** 다음 질문의 대답으로 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Weren't you at the library in the afternoon?
Yes, I was.
Yes, I wasn't.
No, I was.
No, I wasn't.
> 정답: No, I wasn't., Yes, I was.

---

**15.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 이 퍼즐을 풀 수 없니?
Didn't she solve this puzzle?
Can she solves this puzzle?
Can't she solve this puzzle?
She can't solve this puzzle?
> 정답: Can't she solve this puzzle?

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그가 이 책을 사지 않았니?
Didn't he bought this book?
Did he buy this book?
He didn't buy this book?
Didn't he buy this book?
> 정답: Didn't he buy this book?

---

**17.** 주어진 문장을 부정의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
They did community service on Saturday.
Did they do community service on Saturday?
Aren't they do community service on Saturday?
Didn't they do community service on Saturday?
They didn't community service on Saturday?
> 정답: Didn't they do community service on Saturday?

---

**18.** 다음 문장을 부정 의문으로 바꿀때 틀린 부분을 바르게 고치시오. She is a nurse. → Doesn't she a nurse?
> 정답: Isn't

---

**19.** 다음 문장을 부정 의문으로 바꿀때
틀린 부분을 바르게 고치시오. You will play the guitar in the evening. → Don't you play the guitar in the evening?
> 정답: Won't

---

**20.** 다음 문장을 부정 의문으로 바꿀때
틀린 부분을 바르게 고치시오. Your mom cooked this meal last night. → Doesn't your mom cook this meal last night?
> 정답: Didn't
